name: coins-hold-and-win-math
description: A2A discovery card for the deterministic slot-math capabilities of the Coins: Hold & Win play-money demo (no real money, no accounts, no AI/LLM runtime). NO LIVE/HOSTED A2A ENDPOINT: the `url` points to the project repository, not a JSON-RPC A2A endpoint (a hosted endpoint is deferred to phase C). The skills below ARE callable locally in phase B via the in-repo stdio MCP server (tools/mcp/server.mjs) wrapping src/slotmath.js — see x-lifecycle.localMcpServer, STATUS.md, and docs/adr/0020-local-stdio-mcp-server.md.

skills.name: Verify RTP (exact)
skills.description: Compute the exact theoretical return-to-player, house edge, per-line hit frequency, standard deviation, and jackpot odds for the play-money model by full payline enumeration. Deterministic: no RNG, no network. Implemented by theoreticalRtp() in src/slotmath.js.

skills.name: Simulate RTP (seeded Monte-Carlo)
skills.description: Run a seeded Monte-Carlo simulation of the full game (base lines plus the Hold & Win feature) and return total RTP with a 95% confidence interval, the line/bonus RTP split, hit frequency, and bonus-trigger and grand-jackpot rates. Deterministic for a given seed. Implemented by monteCarloFullGame() in src/slotmath.js.

localMcpServer.note: Callable locally over MCP stdio only (e.g. `npm run mcp:serve`), in the caller's own process; no network endpoint, no auth, no secrets. A hosted endpoint is deferred to phase C.

x-lifecycle.note: Growing until explicitly frozen (see STATUS.md). Phase B: the MCP tools are callable locally via a stdio server (see localMcpServer); liveEndpoint/streaming/pushNotifications stay false because no HOSTED A2A/MCP-HTTP endpoint exists yet — that, plus machine-to-machine auth, is deferred to phase C.
